{{Quote|Saba has the true elite force here. What I wouldn't give for a roster made up of Jedi...|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] on the Wild Knights|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Ylesia">''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''</ref>}}
The '''Wild Knights''' was an ''ad hoc'' [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], made up of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], that was founded and trained by the [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Saba Sebatyne]]. The members of the squadron were all trained in the use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by either Saba or [[Eelysa]]. They flew an odd collection of ships.

==Known vessels==
*3 [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]]s
*2 [[I-7 Howlrunner]]s
*''[[Jolly Man]]''
*2 [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s
*''[[Sureshot]]''
*[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]]
*[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]
*3 [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]]
